commit.message:
ci: add GitHub Actions docs deployment workflow

Triggers on every push to main (and manually via workflow_dispatch).
Installs mkdocs + mkdocs-material + mkdocstrings, installs the
cc_stream package so autodoc imports work, then runs:

    mkdocs gh-deploy --force --clean

which builds the site and force-pushes it to the gh-pages branch.
GitHub Pages then serves it at:

    https://sparsh-karna.github.io/cc-stream/

commit.message:
providers: preserve provider instance identity in registry cache (#113)

* providers: preserve provider instance identity in registry cache

* providers: remove cache versioning

Backward compatibility is not a concern, so the version field and
mismatch guard in the model cache are unnecessary complexity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* cache: group models by provider and fix slash-in-model-ID lookups

Restructure ModelCache to group models by provider, eliminating
per-model repetition of provider_type, owned_by, and object fields.
Drop the always-"model" Object field entirely.

Fix splitModelSelector fallthrough: when a qualified lookup fails
(e.g. "meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-70B" where "meta-llama" is not a
provider name), fall through to unqualified lookup using the original
model string instead of returning nil. Applied to GetProvider,
GetModel, Supports, and GetProviderType.

Harden cache tests with fatal guards before slice indexing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

test: use cookie auth (no ?token=) for WS terminal to match browser behavior

query parameter. The server may only register 'terminal sessions' for
cookie-authenticated WS connections (browser) vs token-param WS (API).

Add live collaboration features with autosave optimization

🤝 Live Collaboration Enhancements:
- Debounced autosave system (300ms delay) to optimize for rapid changes
- Visual save indicators with fade-in/fade-out animations
- Live collaboration status indicator in header with pulsing animation
- Activity tracking to show collaboration readiness

✨ Autosave Features:
- All user actions autosave automatically (labels, annotations, notes, flags)
- Navigation changes (run switching) also autosaved
- Prevents data loss during collaborative sessions
- Optimized to avoid excessive saves during rapid interactions

🎨 User Experience Improvements:
- "✅ Saved" indicator appears after each autosave
- Real-time collaboration status in header
- Console messages guide users on collaboration features
- Smooth transitions and professional indicators

🔧 Technical Implementation:
- Debounced saving with clearTimeout to prevent race conditions
- Activity tracking with localStorage timestamps
- Responsive collaboration status updates
- Non-intrusive visual feedback system

Perfect for live collaborative annotation sessions!

commit.message:
feat: user interests + Redis cache improvements

- Add interests text[] column to users table (migration 0024)
- Add CLUB_INTERESTS constant to backend (interests.constants.ts)
- Add interests field to UpdateUserDto with IsIn validation (max 10)
- Replace global search cache invalidation with per-user version bumping
  - bumpUserSearchVersion() on create/update (no other users affected)
  - invalidateSearchCacheGlobal() on delete only (material must disappear)
  - getUserSearchVersion() embedded in cache key for instant freshness
- Switch deletePattern from KEYS to SCAN to avoid blocking Redis event loop
- Add incrementUserSearchVersion / getUserSearchVersion to RedisCacheService

commit.message:
Phase 8: Cross-size MOV, MOVEA, RVBIT/RVBYT, SETF, UPDPSW, LDPR/STPR, TASI

Add 20 system/utility opcodes:
- Cross-size MOV: sign extend (MOVSBH/MOVSBW/MOVSHW), zero extend
  (MOVZBH/MOVZBW/MOVZHW), truncate with OV (MOVTHB/MOVTWB/MOVTWH)
- MOVEA: move effective address (MOVEAB/MOVEAH/MOVEAW)
- RVBIT (bit-reverse byte), RVBYT (byte-swap word)
- SETF: set byte from condition code evaluation
- UPDPSW: update PSW with mask (W=24-bit, H=16-bit limit)
- LDPR/STPR: privileged register load/store
- TASI: atomic test-and-set byte (Format III)

Also adds sub-word register write support (wr_size on regfile) so
byte/half writes preserve upper register bits, matching MAME's
SETREG8/SETREG16 behavior.

54/54 steps match MAME. Phases 2-7 regression: all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Revert language switcher from dropdown back to DE/EN text toggle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Prove subregs_disjoint, subregs_cover, ancestor_bags_empty, seiferasNetwork_sorts assembly

Reduce Sorts.lean from 4 sorry's to 1 (finishAt_sorts_perm).

New theorems:
- mem_subregs_of_desc: registers in descendant bags are in subregs
- mem_subregs_exists_bag: converse — subregs elements come from descendant bags
- subregs_disjoint: subtrees at same level have disjoint register sets
- subregs_cover: every wire is in some subtree (given ancestor bags empty)
- capacity_ancestor_lt_one: γ·A²>1 forces ancestor capacity < 1
- ancestor_bags_empty: convergence + γ·A²>1 empties ancestor bags

seiferasNetwork_sorts now fully proved modulo finishAt_sorts_perm, using
Build.exec_bind to decompose the network into stages + finishAt.

Added hypotheses hA2 (γ·A²>1) and hparity to seiferasNetwork_sorts,
matching Seiferas 2009 p.4: "holding 1/λ to less than A²".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: enforce role-based access control on settings, data, and security routes

Add requireAnyRole guards across 75+ route files to enforce proper RBAC:
- ADMIN only: custom objects, fields, forms, reference data, import/export
- ADMIN + TENANT_ADMIN: API keys, webhooks, templates, broadcasts, views
- Update navigation config to match route-level role restrictions
- Widen security/roles and security/permissions nav to TENANT_ADMIN

Introduce requireRoleAndFeature helper combining role check + feature flag
into a single call, replacing the repetitive two-call pattern. Add typed
role constants (ADMIN_ONLY, ADMIN_OR_TENANT_ADMIN) to eliminate stringly-
typed role names across the codebase.

fix: align FlyExecutionClient timeout handling with LocalExecutionClient

fix: delete and reset now properly clean up staging + rule hit data

Both routes were missing RuleHit, StagingTransaction, and StagingUpload
deletions. PostgreSQL FK constraints were blocking Transaction and Upload
deletion when staging rows still referenced them, causing silent failures.

commit.message:
Add peak normalization to detection audio-slice endpoint

Scales each audio clip so its loudest sample reaches full scale (±1.0),
ensuring consistent playback loudness across detection clips. Adds an
optional normalize query parameter (default true) to allow disabling.

commit.message:
feat(mcp-security): S2-2 cross-instance rate limiting + S4-2 chain integration tests

S2-2: Dual-layer rate limiting across all 13 MCP servers:
- Added 3 missing rate limit configs (chain_orchestrator, pubmed, cultural_competency)
- Wired persistent rate limiting into 6 servers (fhir, hl7-x12, chain-orchestrator, postgres, medical-codes)
- Pattern: in-memory check first (DoS), persistent after auth (identity-based cross-instance)
- 29 tests covering config coverage, tier classification, RPC contract

S4-2: Chain integration tests (29 tests):
- Chain 1 (Claims Pipeline) and Chain 6 (Medical Coding) definition verification
- State machine transitions, conditional steps, placeholder handling
- Audit trail, error recovery, cross-server data flow mapping

All 5 updated edge functions deployed. Blind spots tracker: 8/12 fixed.
